heading: Transfer of appropriations by House Leadership Offices
label: 5105 Transfer of appropriations by House Leadership Offices
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 74a–11 of this titleSection is from the 1999 Emergency Supplemental Appropriations Act.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Each office described under the heading “HOUSE LEADERSHIP OFFICES” in the Act making appropriations for the legislative branch for a fiscal year may transfer any amounts appropriated for the office under such heading among the various categories of allowances and expenses for the office under such heading.

children.heading: Official expenses
children.label: b Official expenses
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to any amounts appropriated for official expenses.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: c Applicability
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 1999 and each succeeding fiscal year.
